evals.prompt: Propose a refactoring plan for a React component that is currently 350 lines long, performs direct API calls in a useEffect, modifies Zustand state directly in event handlers, and has nested if-statements up to 4 levels in JSX.
evals.expected_output: Safe, step-by-step refactoring plan detailing baseline establishment, incremental changes (such as hook extraction and component splitting), and parity checking.
expectations: The plan suggests running existing unit tests to establish a baseline before refactoring.
The plan recommends extracting API data fetching and handlers into a custom hook.
The plan recommends splitting the main component into smaller sub-components.
The plan suggests performing incremental commits at each safe stage.
The plan includes a verification phase checking both UI Parity and State Integrity.
